name: Sweet Raisin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, dissolve yeast and sugar in lukewarm water. When the yeast has foamed, add the eggs and sugar that have been beaten together. Add anise, grated rinds, and salt.
2. In a large pot, mix flour and raisins. Gradually add the yeast mixture to the flour, mixing and blending until a dough forms.
3. Rub oil over the dough, cover, and set in a draft-free area to rise for about 2 hours.
4. Punch down the dough and let it rise again. (Oil your hands before handling the dough so it doesn't stick.)
5. On the second rise, divide the dough into four pieces. Shape into loaves and place them into oiled bread loaf pans.
6. Let the dough double in bulk. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
7. Loosely cover the pans with foil, reduce heat to 300 degrees, and bake an additional 20 minutes.
